summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WaveWatch streaming platform iteration 8 enhancements including Dashboard 'Votre avis compte' with 1-10 colored rating bars, ContentCard hover overlays with eye/plus buttons, Hero movie logo from TMDB, Admin activity feed, TMDB update functionality, and enhanced playlists with user badges and likes/dislikes counts.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: 500 Internal Server Error when sending user messages
flaky_endpoints.workaround: User messaging system may not be fully implemented yet

ui_bugs.issue: Color picker button (Couleur) not found on playlist detail page
ui_bugs.note: May need to test with user-owned playlist rather than public playlist

passed_tests: Backend API health check (50/52 tests passed - 96.2% success rate)
Admin login with admin@wavewatch.com / WaveWatch2026! works perfectly
Homepage hero shows movie logo image from TMDB instead of plain text title
ContentCard hover overlay shows eye button (mark watched) at bottom on hover - functional and clickable
ContentCard hover overlay shows plus button (add playlist) on hover - functional and clickable
Dashboard 'Votre avis compte' section with 1-10 colored rating bars (red/yellow/green) for Contenu, Fonctionnalites, Design
Dashboard guestbook textarea is functional and accepts input
Dashboard submit review button found and enabled
Dashboard 'Avis de la communaute' section found with community reviews
Dashboard collapsible sections are functional (expand/collapse working)
Admin page Feed tab found and accessible
Admin page TMDB tab with 3 update buttons (Tendances, Populaires, Prochaines Sorties)
Admin Dashboard tab shows online users counter in stats section
Discover playlists page shows likes/dislikes counts and user badges
Movie detail page has Like/Dislike buttons visible and functional
Platform reviews endpoints working: /api/platform-reviews GET/POST, /api/platform-reviews/mine
Enhanced playlists endpoint working: /api/playlists/public/enhanced with user_info and likes_count
Admin activities endpoint working: /api/admin/activities
TMDB update endpoints working: /api/admin/tmdb-update for trending/popular/upcoming
Playlist color customization endpoint working: PUT /api/playlists/{id}/colors
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor issues to address: 1) User messaging endpoints (/api/messages) returning 500 errors - may need full implementation. 2) Playlist color picker button not visible on public playlists - verify it appears on user-owned playlists. Overall, excellent implementation with most features working perfectly.
